caption: An aerial perspective showcases a waterfront city skyline under a cloudy sky. The scene initially focuses on a calm body of water reflecting the surrounding buildings and sky, with a dense line of trees and mid-rise buildings bordering the shore. As the perspective shifts, the view moves over a city park and a bridge crossing a waterway toward a marina filled with numerous white yachts and sailboats. A grassy area with palm trees lines the edge of the docks. A red car is visible driving across the bridge. In every frame, the text "TIGER REAL ESTATE LLC" is displayed in the bottom right corner. The transition between the views illustrates a sweeping camera movement that reveals the urban landscape, blending the quiet reflection of the water with the activity of the marina and city infrastructure.
